## Summary

Describe what changed.

## Why

Explain why this change is needed.

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature improvement
- [ ] UI / UX update
- [ ] Documentation only
- [ ] Refactor / maintenance

## Test notes

What devices, apps, or scenarios were checked?

## Checklist

- [ ] I kept the change focused
- [ ] I did not include unrelated cleanup
- [ ] I tested the behavior I changed
- [ ] I updated docs if needed
